name: ARIP Public Company Limited
summary: ARIP Public Company Limited engages in the management of events and marketing activities in Thailand. It operates through three segments: Media and Contents, Management of Event, and Digital Service. The company sells and distributes advertising spaces and services on traditional media, digital media, and online social media in the fields of business, management, and information communication technologies (ICT), including Business+, a magazine that provides analysis on the economy, business, management strategy, administration, marketing, and business trend updates; Business+ Top 1000 Companies, a magazine that compiles business information of the registered companies in Thailand to list the top 1,000 companies with the highest revenue; and COMTODAY or techhub.in.th, an ICT and consumer electronics knowledge source. It also organizes IT exhibitions and trade shows, as well as offers comprehensive event management and integrated marketing services service for conventions and exhibitions under the COMMART name. In addition, it offers digital marketing and consultant services, such as online marketing strategy, branding communication through digital media, online communication strategy, content marketing strategy, creative content, online content management, data analytic and reports, and online media plan and buying media, including achievement measurement; and enterprise learning platform, an online training platform using cloud technology. Further, the company engages in the production of e-books, advertisements, and content in digital media; production and distribution of IT-related publications; and placement of advertisements. ARIP Public Company Limited was founded in 1989 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
